positive: A vibrant, detailed illustration of a stylized, friendly mountain owl perched on a glowing branch. The scene uses thick, clean lines and bold silhouettes, capturing the owl's natural elegance. The color palette is limited to deep indigo, emerald green, burnt orange, and cream, providing excellent contrast for print. Background elements include abstract lunar phases and constellations subtly woven into the foliage. Highly detailed, flat vector art style, perfect for apparel transfer, centered composition, dramatic backlighting, symmetrical layout, digital ink drawing, high resolution, Kawaii-inspired but sophisticated.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, low resolution, watermarks, noise, dirty, cropped, extra limbs, bad anatomy, gradient, photorealistic, grayscale
